title: Parkio Daily for May 8, 2026
teaser: Level99 gaming venue and Six Ravens savory hand pies arrive at Disney Springs this summer. Plus Cool KIDS' SUMMER entertainment.

bignews.title: Level99 Immersive Gaming Experience Opens at Disney Springs This Summer
bignews.body: Level99 brings 60+ life-sized mini-games and real-world challenges to Disney Springs West Side. The sprawling adult and teen gaming venue features 63 Challenge Rooms, Player-vs-Player Duels, and a two-story bar serving Detroit-style pizza and handcrafted cocktails. It will be Disney Springs' largest Level99 location featuring over 40 original art installations.

bignews.title: Six Ravens Brings Savory Hand Pies to Disney Springs
bignews.body: Gideon's Bakehouse launches Six Ravens, a new grab-and-go concept at Disney Springs The Landing. The menu features Coffyns, house-made yeast rolls stuffed with savory fillings inspired by Medieval European pastries, plus smashed potatoes with dips and local craft beers from Sideward Brewing and The Ravenous Pig.

topstories.title: DescenDANCE Party and Camp Rock Jam Coming to Disney Springs
topstories.body: Select summer nights will feature high-energy dance parties at the AdventHealth Waterside Stage celebrating Disney+ originals Descendants: Wicked Wonderland and Camp Rock 3. The events are part of Cool KIDS' SUMMER programming at Disney Springs.

topstories.title: Disney Springs Promises Fresh Experiences with Every Visit
topstories.body: Disney Springs continues rotating pop-ups, limited-time offerings, and new storefronts to deliver fresh shopping and dining experiences. CrazyShake has a couple weeks remaining, and more pop-up concepts are coming soon to various locations throughout the district.

spotlight.title: Plan Your Early Morning at Disney Springs
spotlight.body: Beat the crowds at Disney Springs with morning shopping, dining, and entertainment. Many locations open early for a more relaxed experience before the afternoon rush. Check the Disney Springs website for current hours and early-bird offerings.
